sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16727" key="a)sugkataqete/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀσυγκατα-θετέω</orth>, <sense id="n16727.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">withhold one's assent,</tr_> S.E.M.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0062.tlg030:7:157" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.157</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
